description: Trio save layer (FEAT-010 slice 8a-ii, DEC-59): persist the accumulated flat draft_state from run_trio_pass (planner/orchestration.py) into a saved Plan(lifecycle=PROPOSED) owned by school+author, with the full child graph. DEPENDS ON TASK-069 (A1 must emit `title` first). The save (1) derives the required Plan.cycle via ai.services.grounding._active_cycle(school) and injects it as the bare `cycle` key (surfacing a precondition failure if the school has no active cycle, never fabricating); (2) synthesizes the formset management forms (TOTAL_FORMS/INITIAL_FORMS at every level: top-level step + extra formsets, and nested criteria-{i}-measurement, criteria-{i}-measurement-{j}-channel, steps-{i}-{seg}, steps-{i}-evidence, review_events-{i}-input) which the folds never write, counting rows by the {prefix}-(d+)- regex; (3) builds a QueryDict (single value per key — collectDraftState/the planner formset M2M model is single-valued) and reuses the PlanCreateView bind->validate->_save_plan(PROPOSED)+save_nested+_save_flag_requests path so the saved graph is identical to the browser one-shot create (parity), atomic all-or-nothing. Out of scope: promotion-gate check, gate-closure re-invoke (8b), admin-promote + Flag persistence (9). Addresses FEAT-010; harness SLICE=save_draft.
acceptance_criteria: The accumulated flat draft_state from run_trio_pass is saved as a Plan in lifecycle=proposed, owned by the originating school and author, with the full graph populated: plan scalars, every formset row, every nested child, and every cross-row binding the draft_state carried.

The save round-trips: re-reading the saved Plan reproduces the draft_state's content (scalar values, formset row counts, nested children, and bindings) with nothing dropped, duplicated, or reordered into a different binding.

For a given draft_state, the saved Plan graph is identical to what the existing browser one-shot create flow persists from the same posted data (parity), and the save is atomic all-or-nothing: a draft_state whose forms/formsets fail validation persists no Plan and surfaces the validation failure rather than a partial or invalid Plan.

The whole-project gate stays green and the context cascade validates. The promotion-gate check, the gate-closure re-invoke loop, admin-promote, and Flag-row persistence are out of scope (slices 8b/9).
